posts.author: whtseng (Wei-Hong Tseng)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently public links cannot be generated from workdocs created through the File Column. Please can you look into this and make it available?

What are you trying to achieve

Make Workdocs created through the File Column shareable so we can share the viewable link with external freelancers and clients.
